# vibeprompt
> Free, open-source prompt library and vibe coding workflow for developers building with AI.

## About
vibeprompt provides battle-tested prompts for AI-assisted development and a 9-step workflow from idea to shipped product. No login required, no cost, MIT licensed.

## Key Pages
- /workflow - The 9-step vibe coding workflow (idea, PRD, architecture, scaffolding, building, debugging, shipping)
- /browse - Full prompt library with 40+ prompts across planning, coding, debugging, and shipping categories
- /scan - Landing page scanner that checks SEO, conversion, security, and AI discoverability
- /articles - Articles on vibe coding workflow, common mistakes, and how to use AI effectively
- /awesome - Curated list of AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, etc.)

## Usage Policy
All content is free to use, cite, and index. No restrictions on AI crawling or citation.
